title: selago cedrimontana
intro: Selago cedrimontana, also known as Cedrimontana's Selago, is a rare, flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Selago cedrimontana include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
